description: Registry of all marketplace web templates with brand identity, DNA archetype, completeness flag and metadata. Each template's `archetype` field corresponds to an HTML composition under templates/preview_compositions/<category>/<archetype>.html. The full DNA (hero_style, navbar_style, density, tone, conversion_pattern, ...) lives in apps/catalog/template_dna.py. Templates with `live_preview: true` ALSO have a content registry entry in apps/catalog/template_content.py and (re-)use a per-archetype skin folder under templates/live_templates/<category>/<archetype>/, making them fully navigable multi-page websites accessible at /templates/<cat>/<slug>/preview/. v0.6.1: specialist skin hosts TWO templates (cardio + dermatologia-elite-roma) and has been fully copy-abstracted (Phase 2g.2, Session 14). D-044 lifted by D-048, D-047 governs chrome authoring. v0.7.0: Session 15 added the ecommerce DNA pilot (Luxe fashion-editorial + Bottega artisan-workshop), fixed the missing dermatologia preview (zero TemplateAsset from Session 13's skip), rebalanced the mw-page-hero CSS for navbar clearance, regenerated stale gusto/sapore PNGs. The D-047 chrome-authoring contract now also applies to per-archetype preview compositions (not just live-template chrome): Session 15 lifted 3 cardio literals from templates/preview_compositions/medical/specialist.html that Session 14 had missed. v0.7.1: Session 17 closed the Phase 2g2x.1 business identity-crash case — Pragma gets its own `corporate-suite` archetype and Elevate gets its own `startup-saas-landing` archetype, both authored under D-047 from line one, with disjoint imagery pools (`business-corporate`, `business-startup`). Legacy `business.html` preserved per D-036 but architecturally unused by any published template. See D-050. v0.7.2: Session 18 closed the Phase 2g2x.1 portfolio identity-crash case — Chiara gets her own `editorial-designer-grid` archetype (cream paper, NO big hero photo, typographic+index silhouette) and Pixel gets his own `cinematic-photographer` archetype (near-black, fullbleed dominant photo, film-strip EXIF bar), both authored under D-047 from line one, with disjoint imagery pools (`portfolio-designer`, `portfolio-photographer`). Legacy `portfolio.html` preserved per D-036 but architecturally unused. See D-051. v0.7.3: Session 19 triage fix — Chiara's `editorial-designer-grid` preview had a real layout overflow (h1 at 82px wrapped to 5 lines, content stack bled into ledger area). Fixed surgically: h1 82→62 px + tighter margins + `overflow: hidden` safety net in the composition, + headline copy trimmed 57→47 chars in DNA ('Sistemi di identità visiva costruiti una griglia alla volta.' → 'Identità visive, una griglia alla volta.'). Both signature signals preserved; new headline deliberately mirrors Pixel's '…, una luce alla volta.' syntactic rhythm. Pixel untouched. See D-052.

templates.name: Dermatologia Elite — Studio Ricciardi
templates.tagline: Dermatologia clinica, chirurgica ed estetica · Roma Veneto
templates.reuse_notes: Second template on the `specialist` archetype. Reuses the same live_templates/medical/specialist/ skin as cardio-studio-specialistico — ZERO new HTML files. Differentiated via brand (Studio Ricciardi), accent (forest green #3d5437 vs cardio red #9c2a2a), font (Bodoni Moda vs Cormorant), and dermatology-specific content registry.

templates.name: Chiara — Portfolio Creativo
templates.dna_notes: Session 18: cream paper page with NO big hero photo — the hero IS the typography (huge Syne display headline + numbered project index card right). 4 indexed rows top-right, 3-card case-study panel bottom, clients ribbon + studio coordinates split footer. Deliberately photo-independent so a failing image URL degrades gracefully.

templates.name: Pixel — Portfolio Fotografico
templates.dna_notes: Session 18: near-black page with a dominant fullbleed photograph covering ~62% of the canvas, corner frame marks, top-left series counter chip, monospaced EXIF credit bar pinned to the hero bottom (pellicola/ottica/stampa cells), 4-frame filmstrip gallery below with named series + disciplines + years, 4-cell EXIF footer. Bracketed [ ... ] CTAs in mono-uppercase — cinematic and technical.

templates.name: Bottega — Shop Artigianale
templates.tagline: Fatto a mano, fatto col cuore
templates.dna_notes: Session 15: full cream page, typographic-led hero (no photo), rubber-stamped info panel, N°-labeled edition cards. Macro tone differentiation from Luxe — same imagery pool, opposite page color.

templates.name: Luxe — Fashion Store
templates.dna_notes: Session 15: full dark charcoal page, italic Cormorant 108px headline, full-bleed fashion-model cover, gold editorial tile strip. Shares imagery pool with Bottega — differentiated purely by macro tone + typography.
